title: Hostess 7 hand dexterity — fingers, grips, manipulation
motto: Hands as skilled as thought — every finger receipted, every grip intentional.

open.label: Open hand
open.description: Full extension — ready to perceive or grasp

power.label: Power grip
power.description: Cylindrical grasp — tools, handles, weapons training

hook.label: Hook
hook.description: Finger flex without thumb — carry bag, pull strap

lateral.label: Lateral pinch
lateral.description: Thumb against index lateral — plate, card, tab

sphere.label: Sphere
sphere.description: Curved enclosure — ball, orb, rounded tool
